allies.rationale_text: Narratives helps persuasion-principles bind an idea to emotion and memory so it can travel farther than raw logic alone.
Empathy helps persuasion-principles tune the message to what the audience actually cares about rather than to what the expert wants to say.
allies.source_quote: Perspective taking is vital for crafting messages that resonate

antagonists.rationale_text: Critical-thinking slows persuasion-principles down by asking whether the message is merely effective or actually well grounded.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Persuasion-principles conflicts with intellectual-humility when persuasion techniques exploit cognitive shortcuts that override genuine evidence evaluation.
structured_tensions.source_quote: persuasion-principles conflicts with intellectual-humility (intellectual humility) when persuasion techniques exploit cognitive shortcuts that override genuine evidence evaluation.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Persuasion-principles conflicts with authenticity when strategic framing of a message compromises the transparency required for durable trust.
structured_tensions.source_quote: persuasion-principles conflicts with authenticity (authenticity) when strategic framing of a message compromises the transparency required for durable trust.

curation_notes.summary: The relation file keeps the source's clearest bounded graph: story and perspective as allies, with critical-thinking as the strongest current-vocabulary antagonist.
donor_drops: Did not manufacture structured tensions because the raw file is rich in allies and antagonists but not in explicit named tension blocks.
open_questions: Cognitive-load-theory is a source-real ally too, but narratives and empathy were the more central operational anchors.
